title: B.L.S.A.I.D
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:B.L.S.A.I.D}} {{Background|file=BG Black.png}} {{VoidedTheme|mono}}
[[File:Bvid logo.png|center|thumb|720x720px|link=]] B.L.S.A.I.D
OVERVIEW:
The '''Backrooms Large Scale Anomaly Investigation Department''', also known as '''B.L.S.A.I.D''', is a subdivision and department of the M.E.G dedicated to investigating and researching Backrooms-Wide events, in order to either find a safe way to contain it or find a safe way to survive it, allowing the rest of M.E.G to focus on other important priorities such as survival and exploration. The '''B.L.A.S.I.D''' was founded in 2016 during the [[Phenomenon 12|Flicker]], allowing for reasonable aid during the times of darkness and contributed to the survival rate of millions within the Backrooms. While intended to only be a temporary measure during the Flicker, it has now become a substantial part of the M.E.G and officially was instituted as a permanent department in late 2019. Following the Flicker, the '''B.L.S.A.I.D''' has become a major part in the M.E.G combating major events and anomalies. Recently, the '''B.L.S.A.I.D''' came into the limelight yet again due to the department being put in charge of investigating [[Come to Light (1/2)|Phenomenon 20]], a Backrooms-wide anomaly shaping and warping levels into desolate and bleak versions of themselves. Unlike other M.E.G departments, '''B.L.S.A.I.D''' does not have a unique outpost, instead it is scattered across the many M.E.G outposts throughout the Backrooms. Their "headquarters" or standard center of operations is located in [[Base Alpha]], with smaller sectors located in [[Level 1|Base First Light]] and the [[Level 114|M.E.G Infamart Haven]]. Despite these circumstances, a project is underway to construct two new outposts within the [[Abstraction|Void Subcluster]] specifically for the '''B.L.S.A.I.D''': [[Project Lovehall|Outpost Lovehall]] and Base Outlook.
BRANCHES:
'''B.L.S.A.I.D''' consists of two main branches, which work in conjunction to achieve the department's main focus.
RESEARCH
Arguably the most prominent Branch of the '''B.L.S.A.I.D''', the Reasearch Branch handles much of the investigation and experimentation of the department. Some of these includes overviewing reports, looking into anomalies, as well as creating and utilizing devices and machinery. Unlike the other Branch of '''B.L.S.A.I.D''', the Research Branch is more centralized, with the biggest concentration being on [[Base Alpha]]. Smaller pockets exists across the '''B.L.S.A.I.D''''s various clusters such as within the [[Level 114|M.E.G Infamart Haven.]]
STRATEGY
An equally important Branch, the Strategy Branch handles exploration attempts, project overviews, and evacuation/survival procedures. During the [[Phenomenon 12|Flicker]], the Strategy Branch helped with evacuation protocols, establishing safe checkpoints, and providing aid to many individuals. The Strategy Branch is the most spread out amongst the two Branches, with pockets dispersed across all outposts where '''B.L.S.A.I.D''' is prevalent, including [[Base Alpha]], [[Level 1|Base First Light]], among others.
HIERARCHY:
'''B.L.S.A.I.D''' follows a sort of loose hierarchy compared to other M.E.G departments. The differing levels are as follows:
CHAIRPERSON:
The Chairperson is the highest possible elected position in the '''B.L.S.A.I.D'''. The Chairperson oversees both Branches and is the final line in approvement for any large-scale operations. The Chairperson also attends high profile meetings with other department heads and has connections to the M.E.G Impresarios. This position is equivalent to Department Heads within the U.S. Government. Currently this position is held by '''Ethan Lovehall'''.
BRANCH LEADERS:
Branch leaders are the second line in the '''B.L.S.A.I.D''' hierarchy, belonging to two separate individuals; one leading the Research Branch, and the other commanding the Strategy Branch. Branch Leaders are usually selected and trusted by the Chairperson, and could utilize their branch in any way they please, though have a responsibility as an abuse of their power could lead to their position being revoked. Branch Leaders are usually the first line of approval for large-scale operations, before reaching the Chairperson for the final verdict. There are many other positions in the '''B.L.S.A.I.D''' hierarchy, though it begins to break down after the Branch Leaders. Beyond this point, positions may overlap with each other.
INNOVATIONS:
ESDs
{{Blurimage|file=ImageESD.png|caption=An ESD within [[Level 10]]}} Being one of '''M.E.G's''' greatest innovations, the Electromagnetic Space Detector or ESD is a device useful for mapping out the structure of levels, painting a decent picture of what a level's topography, properties, and nature would be before entering them. ESDs work in a similar fashion to a typical radar dish, first shooting out a multitude of electromagnetic waves into a level via a noclip spot, which would bounce off any solid objects, such as a pillar, a tree, or a mountain. From there the signals would be transmitted back to the ESD via the feed antenna located in the center of the main dish, and a specialized device analyses the signals and outputs them into a rendition of what the interior space of a level may look like. Specialized devices within ESDs are also able to make semi accurate predictions on the rest of the level's layout based on the receiving signals. For example, if a large number of signals were not retransmitted, it could be concluded that the level is either outdoors or infinite in nature. If most signals were received, then the level could be a large open area but not infinite. In total, ESD signals could travel over five miles into a level before dissipating. Although ESDs are commonly large, smaller, portable ESDs also exists, which can also be attached to devices and other objects for easier exploration.
RELATED FILES:
''[[B.L.S.A.I.D/The Void System Anomalies|Anomaly List]]''
{{Collapse|num=1|initial=''Message Report''|final=''Message Report''|body=
[[File:Bvid logo.png|center|thumb|720x720px|link=]] NOTICE FROM THE B.L.S.A.I.D: As of now, [[Come to Light (1/2)|Phenomenon 20]] has affected 5 levels since 26/11/21, and we are now currently unsure of where the Phenomenon's trajectory would be, or where it would take us. However, in our pursuit to uncover the origins or potential ways to combat the phenomenon, we have made a huge [[Come to Light (2/2)|discovery]]. All of the levels that have been affected by Phenomenon 20 are seemingly interconnected, with many exits leading into each other, some being a two-way connection. Even some anomalies that we have discovered on one level crosses over into the other, and even shared properties between the levels have also been discovered. Due to this facet, we have decided to class the 5 levels as one singular system of levels, known as the "Void System" due to their shared properties and dynamics. Due to the now unpredictable nature of the phenomenon, we are watching over every level that shares an entrance or an exit to a level of the Void System. If any sign of Phenomenon 20 arises within the level, if the level is inhabited, we will order an immediate evacuation, and disposable cameras and video recording software will be installed to monitor the level itself for any pattern or any weaknesses that we could target to prevent a large scale event from happening ever again. Sincerely: '''[[Abstraction|-Backrooms Large Scale Anomaly Investigation Department.]]'''
}}
